title: Vytrec's Cobblemon 1vs1
description: A cobblemon 1vs1 modpack created by vytrec to play against viewer's or friends with config changes such as a new max level for pokémon
body:
Its a modpack i've made for me and my community to be challenged into some 1vs1 in cobblemon! Everyone who wants to challenge their friends in a 1vs1 can use this modpack, there are some changes to make 1vs1 more fairly without having a huge difference between levels. 

Important information: this modpack dont include any datapacks! 
You have to install datapacks by yourself if you want to host a world. 

Those datapacks are normally used in my 1vs1: 
- ATM x MSD
- PokeLoot
- CobbleTowns + CobbleDollar Shops
- LegendaryStructures
- Cobblemon - Legendary
- MSD Loot Table
- Path To Legends
